# app { #app.app }

`app`

Main entry point and UI layout for the BAM Shiny Dashboard.

This script assembles the global navbar layout, links static web assets, 
and coordinates the reactive server orchestration loops.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

| Name    | Type        | Description                                              |
|---------|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| www_dir | Path        | Path to static frontend assets (CSS, images, favicons).  |
| app_ui  | page_navbar | The main user interface navigation and layout structure. |
| app     | App         | The instantiated Shiny application runtime object.       |

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [server](#app.app.server) | Root server coordinator for the Shiny application. |

### server { #app.app.server }

```python
app.server(input, output, session)
```

Root server coordinator for the Shiny application.

Delegates the reactive session execution loop downstream to the 
Version 5 analytical backend engine.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type    | Description                                                  | Default    |
|---------|---------|--------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| input   | Inputs  | Reactive container for user interface input nodes.           | _required_ |
| output  | Outputs | Reactive registry handling user interface output components. | _required_ |
| session | Session | The active client connection and runtime execution session.  | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description   |
|--------|--------|---------------|
|        | None   |               |
